mapper.select: select id, file_type, test_time, file_title, content, create_time, update_time as publishDate, test_product_ids, test_merchant_ids, relation_file_ids, agency_name, remarks from cm_test_info where deleted = '0' and find_in_set(#{productId}, test_product_ids) order by update_time desc limit 1

select id, file_type, test_time, file_title, content, create_time, update_time as publishDate, test_product_ids, test_merchant_ids, relation_file_ids, agency_name, remarks from cm_test_info where deleted = '0' and find_in_set(#{merchantId}, test_merchant_ids) order by update_time desc
